error.auth_error: Could not login or find Floor ID. Please check your credentials.

import_history.name: Import historical consumption
import_history.description: Fetches daily readings for a specific month from the Stechome API and injects them into Home Assistant statistics so they appear in the Energy dashboard.

month.name: Month
month.description: Month to import as a number (1-12).
